photorealistic: Photorealistic, high-detail professional photography, natural lighting
cinematic: Cinematic film still, dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field, movie aesthetic
cartoon: Clean cartoon illustration, bold shapes, simple shading, flat colors
anime: Anime style illustration, vibrant colors, expressive, Japanese animation aesthetic
3d: 3D render, studio lighting, clean materials, sharp detail, Blender/Cinema4D style
pixel-art: Pixel art, retro video game aesthetic, 16-bit style, crisp pixels
watercolor: Watercolor painting, soft edges, flowing colors, artistic brushstrokes
oil-painting: Oil painting, rich textures, classical art style, visible brushwork
sketch: Pencil sketch, hand-drawn, line art, monochromatic with subtle shading
minimalist: Minimalist design, flat colors, simple geometric shapes, clean composition
neon: Neon cyberpunk aesthetic, glowing lights, dark background, synthwave colors
vintage: Vintage retro style, muted colors, film grain, 1970s photography aesthetic
